comment: Wave 25 T1 — route-coverage gaps that the E2E harness must skip or normalize. See `tools/e2e/scripts/diff.js` (loadSkipConfig) and `tools/e2e/scripts/capture.js` (stripReturnUrl). Each entry is a slug from `routes.json` (not a URL path).

admin_skip_routes.reason: prod admin /dashboard returns 404 (auth-gated, no anonymous user); dev returns 200 — the dev is a real Dioxus page, the prod is Next.js's not-found
prod admin /policies returns 404 (auth-gated, no anonymous user); dev returns 200 — same as admin-dashboard
